text:
If an unopened banking app is familiar, this money avoidance pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Open one account, write the one number that matters this week. And decide one small next step. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. A budget is a values statement, not a punishment.
